idea-plugin.name: DiffLink
idea-plugin.description:
Open file comparisons directly from editor comments with @DiffLink.

Add @DiffLink:path/to/file or @DiffLink:source, destination, then click the gutter icon to launch IntelliJ IDEA's built-in diff viewer.

Compatibility: IntelliJ IDEA Community and Ultimate, build 232+ (2023.2.1 and later).

Privacy: local-only processing. DiffLink does not upload source code or diff content.
